SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.thermowell

Class ThermowellDesignCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.thermowell.ThermowellDesignCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ThermowellDesignCalculator extends Object implements Serializable
Thermowell wake-frequency and strength calculator following the methodology of ASME PTC 19.3 TW-2016 (with a fallback to the older TW-1974 frequency-limit basis).

The calculation screens an intrusive thermowell against the four standard acceptance checks:

  1. Frequency limit – the vortex shedding frequency must stay sufficiently below the installed natural frequency of the thermowell so that resonance is avoided.
  2. Dynamic (oscillating) stress – the peak alternating bending stress from vortex-induced lift, including resonant magnification, must stay below the allowable fatigue stress amplitude of the material.
  3. Static stress – the steady-state bending stress from the drag force plus the axial pressure stress must stay below the allowable static stress.
  4. Hydrostatic (external pressure) limit – the process pressure must stay below the pressure rating of the thermowell tip treated as a flat circular plate.

All process inputs (fluid density, velocity, viscosity, pressure) can be taken directly from a NeqSim Stream/SystemInterface so that the manual property paste step of the spreadsheet workflow is removed. The geometry uses a representative (mean) shank diameter for the mass term and the root diameter for the section modulus, which is a conservative engineering approximation of the stepped/tapered shank treatment in PTC 19.3.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    calcAll()
    Runs the full thermowell calculation and the four PTC 19.3 acceptance checks.
    private double
    computeStrouhal(double re)
    Computes the Strouhal number as a function of Reynolds number using the standard subcritical plateau value with the PTC 19.3 low-Reynolds correction.
    double

    Returns the calculated peak dynamic (oscillating) stress.
    double
    getFrequencyRatio()
    Returns the frequency ratio (shedding frequency / installed natural frequency).
    double
    getInstalledNaturalFrequency()
    Returns the installed (corrected) natural frequency.
    double
    getMaxAllowablePressure()
    Returns the maximum allowable external (hydrostatic) pressure of the tip.
    double
    getNaturalFrequency()
    Returns the uncorrected natural frequency.
    double
    getReynoldsNumber()
    Returns the calculated Reynolds number.
    double
    getScrutonNumber()
    Returns the Scruton number (mass-damping parameter).
    double
    getStaticStress()
    Returns the calculated static stress at the root.
    double
    getStrouhalNumber()
    Returns the calculated Strouhal number.
    double
    getVortexSheddingFrequency()
    Returns the vortex shedding frequency.

    isDesignAcceptable()
    Returns whether all four PTC 19.3 acceptance checks pass.

    isDynamicStressCheckPassed()
    Returns whether the dynamic-stress check passed.
    boolean
    isFrequencyCheckPassed()
    Returns whether the frequency-limit check passed.
    boolean

    Returns whether the hydrostatic (external pressure) check passed.
    boolean
    isStaticStressCheckPassed()
    Returns whether the static-stress check passed.
    void
    setCorrectionFactors(double mountingCompliance, double fluidMass, double geometry)
    Sets the PTC 19.3 frequency-correction factors.
    void
    setFrequencyRatioLimit(double limit)
    Sets the frequency-ratio acceptance limit (PTC 19.3 TW-2016 default 0.8; use 0.4 for the conservative TW-1974 basis).
    void
    setGeometry(double lengthM, double rootDiameterM, double tipDiameterM, double boreDiameterM, double tipThicknessM)
    Sets the thermowell geometry.
    void
    setMaterial(double density, double modulusPa, double allowableStaticPa, double allowableFatiguePa)
    Sets the thermowell material properties.
    void
    setProcessConditions(double density, double velocity, double viscosity, double pressurePa)
    Sets the process (fluid) conditions at the thermowell.
    String
    toJson()
    Serializes the calculated results to a pretty-printed JSON string.

  • Constructor Details

    • ThermowellDesignCalculator

      public ThermowellDesignCalculator()
      Default constructor for ThermowellDesignCalculator.

  • Method Details

    • setGeometry

      public void setGeometry(double lengthM, double rootDiameterM, double tipDiameterM, double boreDiameterM, double tipThicknessM)
      Sets the thermowell geometry.
      Parameters:
      lengthM - unsupported length in meters (must be > 0)
      rootDiameterM - root outside diameter in meters (must be > bore)
      tipDiameterM - tip outside diameter in meters (must be > bore)
      boreDiameterM - bore diameter in meters (must be ≥ 0)
      tipThicknessM - tip wall thickness in meters (must be > 0)

    • setMaterial

      public void setMaterial(double density, double modulusPa, double allowableStaticPa, double allowableFatiguePa)
      Sets the thermowell material properties.
      Parameters:
      density - material density in kg/m3 (must be > 0)
      modulusPa - modulus of elasticity in Pa (must be > 0)
      allowableStaticPa - allowable static stress in Pa (must be > 0)
      allowableFatiguePa - allowable fatigue stress amplitude in Pa (must be > 0)

    • setProcessConditions

      public void setProcessConditions(double density, double velocity, double viscosity, double pressurePa)
      Sets the process (fluid) conditions at the thermowell.
      Parameters:
      density - fluid density in kg/m3 (must be > 0)
      velocity - free-stream velocity in m/s (must be ≥ 0)
      viscosity - dynamic viscosity in Pa-s (must be > 0)
      pressurePa - process pressure in Pa absolute (must be ≥ 0)

    • setCorrectionFactors

      public void setCorrectionFactors(double mountingCompliance, double fluidMass, double geometry)
      Sets the PTC 19.3 frequency-correction factors.
      Parameters:
      mountingCompliance - foundation/mounting compliance factor Hf (0-1)
      fluidMass - added fluid mass factor Ha (0-1)
      geometry - tapered/stepped geometry factor Hc

    • computeStrouhal

      private double computeStrouhal(double re)
      Computes the Strouhal number as a function of Reynolds number using the standard subcritical plateau value with the PTC 19.3 low-Reynolds correction.
      Parameters:
      re - Reynolds number (must be > 0)
      Returns:
      Strouhal number (dimensionless)

    • calcAll

      public void calcAll()
      Runs the full thermowell calculation and the four PTC 19.3 acceptance checks.

    • isDesignAcceptable

      public boolean isDesignAcceptable()
      Returns whether all four PTC 19.3 acceptance checks pass.
      Returns:
      true if the thermowell design is acceptable

    • getReynoldsNumber

      public double getReynoldsNumber()
      Returns the calculated Reynolds number.
      Returns:
      Reynolds number (dimensionless)

    • getStrouhalNumber

      public double getStrouhalNumber()
      Returns the calculated Strouhal number.
      Returns:
      Strouhal number (dimensionless)

    • getVortexSheddingFrequency

      public double getVortexSheddingFrequency()
      Returns the vortex shedding frequency.
      Returns:
      vortex shedding frequency in Hz

    • getNaturalFrequency

      public double getNaturalFrequency()
      Returns the uncorrected natural frequency.
      Returns:
      natural frequency in Hz

    • getInstalledNaturalFrequency

      public double getInstalledNaturalFrequency()
      Returns the installed (corrected) natural frequency.
      Returns:
      installed natural frequency in Hz

    • getFrequencyRatio

      public double getFrequencyRatio()
      Returns the frequency ratio (shedding frequency / installed natural frequency).
      Returns:
      frequency ratio (dimensionless)

    • getScrutonNumber

      public double getScrutonNumber()
      Returns the Scruton number (mass-damping parameter).
      Returns:
      Scruton number (dimensionless)

    • getStaticStress

      public double getStaticStress()
      Returns the calculated static stress at the root.
      Returns:
      static stress in Pa

    • getDynamicStress

      public double getDynamicStress()
      Returns the calculated peak dynamic (oscillating) stress.
      Returns:
      dynamic stress in Pa

    • getMaxAllowablePressure

      public double getMaxAllowablePressure()
      Returns the maximum allowable external (hydrostatic) pressure of the tip.
      Returns:
      maximum allowable pressure in Pa

    • isFrequencyCheckPassed

      public boolean isFrequencyCheckPassed()
      Returns whether the frequency-limit check passed.
      Returns:
      true if shedding frequency is sufficiently below the natural frequency

    • isDynamicStressCheckPassed

      public boolean isDynamicStressCheckPassed()
      Returns whether the dynamic-stress check passed.
      Returns:
      true if the dynamic stress is below the allowable fatigue stress

    • isStaticStressCheckPassed

      public boolean isStaticStressCheckPassed()
      Returns whether the static-stress check passed.
      Returns:
      true if the static stress is below the allowable static stress

    • isHydrostaticCheckPassed

      public boolean isHydrostaticCheckPassed()
      Returns whether the hydrostatic (external pressure) check passed.
      Returns:
      true if the process pressure is below the tip pressure rating

    • setFrequencyRatioLimit

      public void setFrequencyRatioLimit(double limit)
      Sets the frequency-ratio acceptance limit (PTC 19.3 TW-2016 default 0.8; use 0.4 for the conservative TW-1974 basis).
      Parameters:
      limit - frequency-ratio limit (must be > 0)

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the calculated results to a pretty-printed JSON string.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the calculation results
